subject: apollo readiness update for London | Frida Kahlo | Q3 review | INIT-8509
body: Please note the apollo stream in London has shifted to a tighter timeline. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Background context draws on methods associated with Frida Kahlo. Reference initiative INIT-8509. Escalate blockers directly if they affect delivery this week. Tracking tags: readiness, delivery.
